title: FERTICOOP-GO- Innovacions per adaptar-se a les millors tècniques disponibles (MTD’s) en el sector agrari cooperatiu català
description: A project funded under the Catalonia Rural Development Programme 2014-2020 aiming to develop innovative tools for sustainable management of livestock slurry and agricultural fertilization in Catalan cooperatives. It seeks to reduce greenhouse gas and ammonia emissions, optimize soil fertility management and integrate digital solutions for technical advisors.
